name: Cash Time Loan Center
description_short: Arizona-based title and registration loan lender offering same-day funding up to $100,000 with approval in as fast as 15 minutes for borrowers of all credit types.
description_long:
Cash Time Loan Centers is an Arizona-based direct lender specializing in vehicle-collateral loans and emergency cash financing. The company operates physical locations throughout Arizona while also offering 100% online loan applications, serving borrowers who need fast access to capital and may have limited credit options elsewhere.

The company offers six primary loan products: Title Loans ($100–$100,000), Personal Loans ($100–$2,500), Registration Loans ($100–$2,500), 100% Online Loans ($100–$100,000), Title Loan Buyouts/Refinancing, and Loan-to-Buy-a-Car products (up to $20,000). All products feature advertised approval timelines of 15 minutes or less, with instant funding to bank accounts or in-store check pickup available. The company explicitly welcomes borrowers with bad credit and states credit type is "no problem" for qualification.

Cash Time distinguishes itself through multiple application channels (phone, online, or in-person), rapid approval and funding speed, and the flexibility of title-based collateral lending for borrowers who own vehicles. Their marketing emphasizes lower interest rates, lower payments, and faster payoff terms compared to competing title loan providers. The company maintains a 4.9-star rating across 11,761 customer reviews, with 10,155 five-star reviews claimed on their website.

As a title and registration loan lender, Cash Time serves a high-risk lending segment. While fast funding and accessibility for bad-credit borrowers are genuine advantages, title loans typically carry significantly higher interest rates and fees than traditional personal loans, and borrowers risk vehicle repossession if unable to repay. The company's marketing claims of "lower rates" and "faster payoff" should be evaluated against actual loan terms, APR disclosures, and comparison shopping with alternative lenders.
address: 15836 N Cave Creek Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85032

company_info.headquarters: 15836 N Cave Creek Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85032

pros: Fast approval in as little as 15 minutes with instant funding capability
Serves all credit types explicitly—bad credit is not a barrier to approval
Multiple loan products ranging from $100 to $100,000 depending on product type
100% online application option available; no store visit required for online loans
Multiple application channels: phone, online, or in-person at multiple Arizona locations
Title loan refinancing/buyout option to potentially lower existing rates and payments
High customer rating (4.9 stars, 11,761 reviews) with majority 5-star reviews
Loan-to-buy-a-car product allows borrowers to purchase vehicle of their choice (up to $20,000)
cons: Title and registration loans carry substantially higher interest rates and fees than unsecured personal loans, creating significant debt burden risk
Vehicle repossession risk if unable to make payments—collateral-based lending puts primary asset at stake
Personal and registration loan limits are capped at $2,500, severely limiting utility for larger emergency needs
No transparent APR, interest rate, or fee disclosure on website; actual costs cannot be verified before application
Marketing claims of 'lower rates' and 'faster payoff' lack specificity and require comparison shopping to validate
best_for: Vehicle owners facing immediate cash emergencies who have exhausted other funding options and can afford title loan interest rates
Borrowers with poor credit history who are ineligible for traditional personal loans or credit cards
Arizona residents needing $100–$100,000 in cash with vehicle collateral and ability to repay within loan term
Borrowers seeking to refinance existing title loans at potentially better rates
diagnosis: Cash Time Loan Centers is best for Arizona vehicle owners facing genuine emergency cash needs who have exhausted traditional lending options and can afford the high interest rates inherent to title lending. The primary caveat is that title loans are expensive short-term solutions that risk vehicle repossession; borrowers should compare rates, calculate total repayment cost, and ensure they can meet payment obligations before proceeding. Consumers should request and carefully review actual APR, interest rates, and fee disclosures before committing.
services: Title loans ($100–$100,000 using vehicle as collateral)
Personal loans ($100–$2,500 for borrowers still making vehicle payments)
Registration loans ($100–$2,500 for vehicles registered in borrower's name with outstanding payments)
100% online loan applications with no store visit required
Title loan refinancing and buyouts to refinance existing title loans at lower rates
Loan-to-buy-a-car financing (up to $20,000 to purchase vehicle of borrower's choice)
Same-day and next-day funding options (direct bank deposit or in-store check pickup)
In-person applications at multiple Arizona locations
Spanish-language support (website available in English and Español)
Bad-credit-welcome lending without credit score minimums
